motion_system: Nearly still product-table gravity, with slight glaze drift along cloudy brush edges and one frozen rupture across the plinth.
color_drift: Pale gray-white air shifts into dusty sky blue, teal, peach, blush pink, lavender-gray, and small yellow-green fades at ceramic bases.
glow_behavior: Low ceramic sheen only: soft rim highlights, pale reflection halos, and tiny warm glints along lightning-like seams.
